posts.title: Five Takeaways from a Research Tech CEO on AI, Rigor, and Research (2026)
posts.description: Daniel Graff-Radford, CEO of Discuss, discusses how AI is reshaping research workflows while maintaining methodological rigor, emphasizing that technology amplifies rather than replaces researcher expertise.

posts.title: Building the Future of Research, Together
posts.description: Announcement of the strategic combination of Discuss, Voxco, and Ascribe to create an integrated platform uniting qualitative depth, quantitative scale, and AI intelligence.

posts.title: Why CATI and Offline Surveys Still Matter in an AI-Dominated World
posts.description: Explores how human-centered research methods like CATI and offline surveys remain essential for capturing nuance and reaching underserved populations despite AI advancement.

posts.title: The Genius in the Basement Can't Save Us This Time
posts.description: Argues that DIY AI approaches lack necessary governance and oversight, advocating instead for strategic partnerships with established platforms built for continuous monitoring.

posts.title: Why Researchers, Not Algorithms, Must Stay at the Center of AI
posts.description: Emphasizes that AI should create conditions for better judgment, not attempt to replace it, promoting responsible AI integration where researchers maintain oversight.

posts.title: iOS 26 Call Screening: What Market Researchers Need to Know
posts.description: Addresses Apple's new call screening feature and its minimal impact on research, offering practical strategies for maintaining phone survey response rates.

posts.title: When the Fourth Firefly Lives in Your Data
posts.description: Uses a metaphor to explain AI model drift and validation challenges, providing frameworks for detecting when AI systems silently change their behavior.

posts.title: Research Quality in the Age of AI
posts.description: Addresses tensions between speed and quality when integrating AI, advocating for guardrails and staged review processes to maintain research integrity.

posts.title: Beyond the Black Box: A Framework for Responsible AI Integration
posts.description: Proposes standards for responsible AI adoption including performance proof, researcher control mechanisms, reproducibility tools, and bias monitoring requirements.

posts.title: Are Your Survey Questions Getting the Whole Story?
posts.description: Explains how AI probing generates deeper survey responses through contextual follow-up questions, with guidance on implementation and customization options.
